item.title: India's Energy Ambitions vs Reality
item.description: 8,540 energy projects analyzed. The gap between announcing capacity and actually building it is enormous -- and 2030 targets are in trouble.

item.title: The Machine That Builds Danger
item.description: How federal funding, car-centric engineering, and accounting tricks create cities that look prosperous but are slowly bankrupting themselves -- and killing people along the way.

item.title: The Loopy Era of AI
item.description: Andrej Karpathy on code agents, AutoResearch, and what happens when AI starts improving itself -- while humans try to keep up

item.title: Blockchain, Demystified
item.description: How a shared notebook that nobody controls and nobody can erase actually works -- from mining to wallets to why it matters.
